diagrams.title: Digital vs Analog Signal Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows the difference between digital (stepped/discrete) and analog (continuous smooth) waveforms
elements: Binary 0 and 1 labels on digital signal
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the fundamental difference between signal types

diagrams.title: TTL Voltage Threshold Levels
diagrams.description: Illustrates voltage ranges for logic 0, logic 1, and undefined regions in TTL logic
diagrams.purpose: Understanding voltage level standards for reliable digital operation

diagrams.title: Basic Logic Gates Symbols
diagrams.description: Shows standard symbols for fundamental logic gates: AND, OR, NOT, NAND, NOR, XOR, XNOR
elements: AND gate symbol with curved back
OR gate with pointed input side
NAND and NOR with bubble modifications
XNOR with bubble and XOR without bubble
diagrams.purpose: Recognizing standard logic gate symbols used in digital circuit design

diagrams.title: Digital System Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchical structure from basic gates to complex digital systems
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how complex digital systems are built from simple components
